title: Aehr Test Systems Stock Earnings Call Q1 2024 Annual Guidance
text: In the Q1 2024 earnings call, Aehr Test Systems management provided guidance for at least $100 million in revenue for fiscal year 2024, representing over 50% growth year-over-year. The company also projected GAAP net income of at least $28 million, indicating earnings growth exceeding 90%. Management highlighted strong momentum in silicon carbide markets with seven secured customers and numerous prospects. The guidance reflected confidence in sustained demand from electric vehicle semiconductor manufacturers. This ambitious outlook positioned Aehr as one of the fastest-growing semiconductor equipment companies.
